metadata.description: Bootstrap a full-stack web application with parallel agent coordination
metadata.author: Carter Schonwald

tasks.description: Initialize FastAPI project with poetry. Create main.py with hello world endpoint at /health that returns {status: ok}. Add CORS middleware allowing all origins.
Create React + TypeScript app using Vite. Add axios dependency. Create src/App.tsx with a button that calls /health endpoint. Console.log the response.
Write docker-compose.yml with services for: postgres (port 5432), redis (port 6379), and nginx (port 80). Add .env.example with DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL.
Add SQLAlchemy and alembic. Create models/user.py with User model (id, email, hashed_password, created_at). Generate initial migration. Add database connection in main.py.
Create /auth/register endpoint. Validate email, hash password with bcrypt, store user, return JWT. Add /auth/login endpoint. Include basic pytest tests.
Create components/LoginForm.tsx and components/RegisterForm.tsx. Add form validation. Wire up to /auth/login and /auth/register endpoints. Store JWT in localStorage.
Write integration_test.sh that: 1) starts docker-compose, 2) waits for services, 3) curls backend /health, 4) checks frontend builds successfully, 5) runs backend tests. Output results.
